sous_titres.text: <font color=yellow>In February 1915, the Turkish army began a crackdown on the Armenian people.</font>
<font color=yellow>thousands of survivors of this genocide came to France.</font>
<font color=yellow>most Armenians chose hard work and sacrifices.</font>
<font color=yellow>The Malakian clan was one of those.</font>
Get your things and get out there!
As police you face danger every day.
Some people don't respect human life.
Carrying a weapon means being prepared to kill...
You will face situations that may be classified into 4 categories.
First we have White. Total absence of danger.
I need not dwell here. For cops, it rarely happens.
You are walking calmly but anything can happen.
An armed individual is facing you.
a cop who is not psychologically prepared to use his weapon...
is a danger both to himself and to those whom he should protect.
"Am I am prepared to risk my life?"...
Lift the leg a little, push the heel...
- And lift the toes. - I can't.
But you must try. Or you'll never walk normally again.
Don't worry. I'm right here - Mom.
Not a doctor. I'm just a nurse.
I only care about the results. And my mother is better.
Ooh, your hand's cold! Eaten anything yet?
Go to the kitchen. Yeva will prepare something.
Here. Your share for the car job.
Yeah, and stop with the cars.
What will I do for money?
We have something better lined up.
Tuesday, at 11 h. Come with Rudy.
Your uncle will tell you where to find us.
What kind of job is it?
- Why did you come here? - Why don't you answer when I call?
Wait downstairs. I'll be done in an hour.
Élodie, what's the problem? It's been 2 days that I've tried to talk to you.
Sorry, but I've been very busy. I'm exhausted.
- Really? And how am I supposed to live? - I have money.
I know you don't see it...
I'm not joking with you, Élodie.
- Anton, we're late! - It'll take time.
- Daniel called. They are waiting for us. - Don't worry.
You'll open this safe, if you don't want anything to happen to your family.
- You could have spared him... - Shut up!
The vehicles were found in parking lot of a supermarket.
Who needs fingerprints? We know who it was.
We'll open a hotel, just a few rooms.
Look over there. It will be for the horses. I'll take care of them.
- You mean horses? - I will learn!
Do not be afraid. Open your palm.
But only if you're with me. Alone, I'm not interested.
Come with us. They're throwing a party.
- You go on. I'll follow later. - Come!
I won't stay. It's getting late.
I have not seen you lately, but wanted to tell you one thing.
One day, you know, you'll take over the business.
Your decisions may be good or bad...
If they see you hesitate, find that you are weak.
Then one of them will try to take your place.
What did you do that night can't happen again.
I was with your father. Sit down.
- What did you talk about? - Everything and nothing. Business.
What would you like me to tell you? The property is not your father's thing.
With that I can set aside a portion or two, not more.
I don't care. This must remain 50-50.
- I don't want anyone else involved. - Sure, but I need a little more.
Get out! She is with me! That goes for you too!
Help me to prevent the sale. I'll get the rest.
Why mess with that place? There are others.
What is this? I'm fine! You're being a pain!
- Who are you? - I'm the owner.
Get out. We're having fun. I'm fine!
It's bothering the customers. Learn to drink or stay home!
We finished drinking so let's go.
I do what I want here. Know who we are?
Then, they were not celebrating the robbery?
We know you didn't hit the owner of the club.
Don't eat or drink, don't talk.
You won't bother anyone in prison. The guards will worship you!
Let's go to the next room. It is quieter.
I tripped and hit my head on a table.
Chief, we have a problem. The guy is changing his statement
What did you threaten to do?
You may have changed your region, Malakian, but you haven't changed your methods.
Wherever you go, there are deaths. That's going to stop.
Next time, you'll need do more than intimidate...
- A nightclub owner to get your way. - And you are threatening me with what?
October 16, 2003. I was at the shopping centre during the shooting.
I was only a lieutenant at the time.
You lost a son there. I lost a friend.
- It's all we have in common. - Goodbye, sir.
- Where is Anton? - I don't know.
Where does he go when he's not home?
Your son doesn't tell me everything.
- Maybe with a girl. - A girl?
to the memory of Georgy Malakian. Georgy was a boy...
cut down by violence the world had chosen.
May his soul rest in peace and the souls of all those who loved him.
Élodie, I feel that there's something wrong.
Is it your mysterious Armenian? Won't you tell me?
- At least tell me what he does. - I don't know.
His name is also a secret?
I'll stop by to pick you up at 18 h.
Remember poker at Zakar's house? I took the shirt of his back.
He said that he was bankrupt then emptied his shop.
- It's Italian. The best. - I can't wear this.
- I have one. They're the best! - We can't go out with the same shoes.
- What kind? - A hotel in Camargue.
It's in progress. Want to invest?
Why do you want to work? The job at the mansion went well.
We can't do things without your father knowledge. You know how it works.
- Let's hold hands. - I did not.
Take care! Those plants have thorns!
In order be ready next summer, we must start now.
What is this? We had a deal!
You talk about money, but I only get promises.
I need to see the colour of it.
For now, I'm paying on account, but it'll not go far.
There are people with much money willing to invest.
I'll get the money. Don't you trust me?
- Why not do it with... - My father?
No chance. Let him out of it.
They want results, but we take our men.
The ministry wants to put an end to slot machines.
As of today, this is the priority. Put your men onto it.
- And Malakian? - Forget him for now.
Why? It's been a problem, and we've been making good progress.
You haven't brought any evidence before the judge...
There's been nothing concrete in this matter!
We won't get anywhere doing that. Nobody dares to rat on Malakian.
I'm confused, Saunier. In Paris, you had good grades.
What are you doing here? I know your record.
Don' make Malakian a personal matter.
There is nothing worse for a cop than a lack of objectivity.
Did you have a good trip?
Every year, with casinos, hotels, shops...
lots of money changes hands on the Riviera.
During the loading and transport, safety is priority.
But when the money is inside the plane...
Therefore, during the minutes between loading and takeoff...
...the aircraft is unattended. That's where we come in.
How many men does it take?
You want to know your share, right?
It's tempting, Milo, but risky. We need to know a little more.
The entrance to the airport is here.
The traansport arrives here. The plane is parked here.
Once the passengers have boarded, they remove the ladder.
How long has he been with this girl?
I'm not stupid. The nurse. How long you been with her?
- I don't know, Milo. - Since she started coming here?
We want to bring a bit of money.
It's more than usual. Thus your percentage drops to 7.
You know I get 12 because the operation is risky.
- That's expensive money. - But the money is clean. I guarantee it.
We have a small business together.
I like Anton. He is your son.
I chose to come here instead of summoning you.
I wanted to talk to you. May I come in?
What should I do? Choose one? Is it a gift from the police?
I didn't come here to meddle in your private life.
and my duty is to inform you of the Malakian family activities.
The doorman of a mansion that was robbed a few days ago.
- What do I have to do with it? - Nothing, directly.
But Anton Malakian participated with those who robbed the mansion...
and the murder of this man.
- He would never do that. - Maybe.
But it is a dead end. Sooner or later he will come to an end.
Or probably the same as happened to his brother.
We can still avoid it. But only you can help.
If you know something, call me.
What can I do for you, Milo?
Rifles, flak jackets bullets and grenades.
What will you do with all this?
He left France 10 years ago and returned to Lebanon, his homeland.
We know that he has continued his arms business there.
His cover for his importing and exporting for the Mediterranean region.
Mainly dates and exotic fruits. He's been only interrogated once.
He convinced the judge that the Syrians
established the company to bring French arms...
Those photos of that meeting Malakian and...
It's kind of complicated. Some I don't recognise.
In any case, is certain that somebody is arming him.
- We want him to be watched. - Okay, but how?
If we take the road, as planned...
they can set up a roadblock. If we use boats, they can't stop us.
We found the creek where we'll start...
two cars that wait for us and then head north in two cars.
In 7 minutes, will be 50 km ahead of the cops.
It will be a nice coup, and us together. You have what it takes.
What's between you and this girl?
I know that you've been seeing her for a while now. What does she know about us?
Nothing. Think I chatter like woman? Talk in my sleep?
Pay attention. With that girl around our necks, we can't afford mistakes.
We are a family. She's different.
you have to finish with her.
I'll send Coutard to replace you.
Okay, Saunier. You're back on the case.
There is no reason to quit.
They can't know what we are preparing.
The next transfer is in 3 weeks.
We have to stay hidden. It is difficult for all of us...
...but do not forget who you are.
We are of the same family...
Meanwhile, be discreet. No more confusion.
You're gone without saying anything, aren't you talking to me?
You don't say anything about your your family, hear.
Tell me, who told you that?
Cops. They came to my house to tell me of your life.
See you Tuesday at my office, right?
We had an agreement, but I couldn't wait.
I'll have the money here, it a question of a few days!
Maybe it was the business right for you.
You did not trust me. I gave you my word!
Tell me, come on! Tell me! Tell me that you made a deal with my father!
The deal was between me and you! Nobody else! Nobody!
The deal is still in the family. I or you, what difference does it make?
- Everything. - If you miss a beat...
You talk of cool? The cop on the quay, the shooting...
He participated in the murder of your brother.
And what you did, will it bring him back to life?
You don't understand. The problem is this girl.
Pay attention. For me, it's all over.
I'll leave you with your ghosts.
Paid to you as soon as possible.
That is why we should get back to work.
You are being cruel. Think about it...
- You can't do that to him. - Stay out of it.
I hate to see it that way.
I won'tt ask where he is.
I know you keep your word. Because you only have one word.
That's why you work for me, right?
Then... what can you do for me?
Why don't you think of other possibilities.
Here are all the transports for next month.
- Something from the wiretap? - Nothing yet.
Check the values of transports for banks, list them by size.
- Did you see Rudy today? - No.
I'm going to the pharmacy. Do you need anything?
I'll never be what you want.
Let us be united for what has to be done.
And then you leave me alone.
Then you can do whatever you want.
I am responsible for security. Can I take them to the control tower.
Hello? I need a taxi, please.
Yes. We are beside the sea.
We look for birds before each takeoff.
The plane is starting to taxi...
They leave the runway for takeoff. It's safer.
Back now. Do not leave until the plane has taken off! Is that clear?
Call someone. Do passengers get out.
Don't shoot! Passengers on the runway!
No one shoots until I tell you! Get everyone here!
Coutard! Call someone! Block their exit!
Go to the car! Do what I say!
Élodie... she's waiting for me on the beach...
